purpose: Make the major public evidence gaps explicit so reviewers, contributors, and programs can see which bounded claims are already supported and which higher-confidence signals still remain open.

gap_families.summary: The repo publishes public contracts and examples, but it does not yet publish evidence from a live public validator service.
gap_families.why_gap_exists: This repository is intentionally a public specs surface rather than a hosted service status page or public operations surface.
missing_or_manual_evidence: real public deployment URL with stable access conditions
recorded public HTTP responses from a deployed service
next_public_hardening_steps: publish a bounded hosted validator endpoint when it exists
add public deployment assumptions to release evidence only after they become real
bounded_non_claims: does not claim a live hosted validator endpoint exists today
does not claim deployed-service behavior beyond the published contracts and examples

gap_families.summary: The repo publishes bounded utility and readiness surfaces, but it does not yet publish external adoption metrics such as stars, forks, downstream usage, or issue volume.
gap_families.why_gap_exists: This public surface is newly hardened and reviewer-facing; external adoption signals require time and real public use after publication.
missing_or_manual_evidence: public stars, forks, or watcher counts with signal value
named downstream consumers or public tool integrations
public issue and discussion history over time
next_public_hardening_steps: publish real adoption signals only after they exist
keep ecosystem-value claims bounded to current public utility rather than projected popularity
bounded_non_claims: does not claim current public traction or ecosystem adoption
does not treat projected usefulness as proof of current usage

gap_families.summary: The repo publishes contributor intake and maintainer workflow, but it does not yet publish evidence of sustained outside contribution history.
gap_families.why_gap_exists: Community health and contribution law can be made explicit immediately, while real outside contribution history only emerges after public operation.
missing_or_manual_evidence: public review history with non-maintainer participants
sustained public contributor activity over multiple releases
next_public_hardening_steps: preserve clean contributor intake after publication
promote contributor-history evidence only when it becomes real and reviewable
bounded_non_claims: does not claim existing independent contributor history
does not equate contributor instructions with proven community activity

gap_families.summary: The repo publishes versioning, compatibility, and change-control posture, but it does not yet publish long multi-release history proving those policies in practice.
gap_families.why_gap_exists: The policy surfaces are explicit now, but multi-release history requires time and future releases to accumulate.
missing_or_manual_evidence: multiple public tagged releases demonstrating stable change discipline
public deprecation history over multiple versions
next_public_hardening_steps: tag public releases once the GitHub repo is published
extend the evidence timeline and changelog with real version-to-version history
bounded_non_claims: does not claim long-horizon stability history today
does not treat written versioning policy as proof of historical compatibility

gap_families.summary: The repo publishes client recipes and API contracts, but it does not yet publish evidence from independent third-party clients running against a public service.
gap_families.why_gap_exists: Client recipes can be published and verified locally before a broader public integration ecosystem exists.
missing_or_manual_evidence: public client compatibility matrix built from outside implementations
next_public_hardening_steps: publish external integration evidence only when real third-party clients exist
keep recipes copyable and contract-aligned so third-party evidence can attach cleanly later
bounded_non_claims: does not claim external client ecosystem maturity today
does not treat copyable recipes as proof of third-party interoperability

gap_families.summary: The repo publishes freshness posture and stale-summary triggers, but it does not yet publish long-horizon evidence showing that those refresh rules have been exercised repeatedly over time.
gap_families.why_gap_exists: Freshness law can be explicit immediately, while repeated successful refresh cycles require time and future public maintenance activity.
missing_or_manual_evidence: multiple public refresh cycles across several releases
public examples of stale-summary detection and correction
next_public_hardening_steps: keep freshness checks green over future releases
extend the evidence timeline with real refresh-cycle milestones rather than hypothetical ones
bounded_non_claims: does not claim long-term freshness history today
does not treat current freshness rules as proof of repeated operational execution

non_claims: This file does not claim that every future public evidence gap is already known.
This file does not replace stronger contracts, provenance, release evidence, adoption posture, or live validator behavior.
